---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the gap or limitation you're running into.

## Proposed Solution
What would you like to see added or changed?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context
Anything else that would help.

---

> **Note:** This project intentionally has zero external dependencies.  
> Features requiring `apt install` will generally not be accepted unless there's a very strong reason.
